mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.avatar, c.nickname, c.create_time, c.content, c.likes,
CASE WHEN c.user_id = a.user_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_author,
CASE WHEN cl.id IS NOT NULL AND cl.is_cancel = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_liked, #{currentUserId} AS current_user_id FROM t_comment c INNER JOIN t_article a ON c.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN t_comment_like cl ON c.id = cl.comment_id AND cl.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.avatar, c.nickname, c.reply_user_id, c.reply_nickname, c.create_time, c.content, c.likes,
CASE WHEN c.user_id = a.user_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_author,
CASE WHEN cl.id IS NOT NULL AND cl.is_cancel = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_liked FROM t_comment c INNER JOIN t_article a ON c.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN t_comment_like cl ON c.id = cl.comment_id AND cl.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_comment ( id, article_id, user_id, nickname, avatar, parent_id, reply_user_id, reply_nickname, content, likes, is_deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{articleId}, #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{parentId}, #{replyUserId}, #{replyNickname}, #{content}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
